message:
test(unit): expand recorder_lexical_schema.rs inline tests (13→44) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 31 new unit tests for Tantivy lexical schema covering:
- Constants: tokenizer names non-empty and versioned, MAX_TOKEN_LENGTH
  bounds, TERMINAL_TOKEN_PATTERN valid regex and alphanumeric matching
- LexicalFieldHandles: Copy, Clone, Debug, all 25 handles distinct,
  complete schema field lookup round-trip for all 20 remaining handles
- Schema: JSON serialization, field count verification
- Fingerprint: non-empty, lowercase hex validation
- Document conversion: ingress with all populated fields verified,
  egress segment_kind, control marker_type, lifecycle phase,
  gap flag (is_gap=true), timestamp/pane_id preservation,
  trigger_event_id presence, event_id/source/event_type/text/
  details_json/schema_version population checks
- Tokenizer behavior: text tokenizer lowercases, path splitting;
  symbols tokenizer lowercases
- Index operations: multiple documents in single index

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
